<{%fg 2%}>+ pkgParent:codeinfra:typParent: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::pkgParent:codeinfra:typParent::parent]

    <{%fg 2%}>+ 3 created<{%reset%}>
